012221211200201000111102202102000 - ASI: 23

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  02 = 0 * 2
  11 = 1 * 1
  20 = 2 * 0
  21 = 2 * 1
  000 = 0 * 00
  012 = 01 * 2
  212 = 21 * 2
  0201 = 02 * 01
  1102 = 11 * 02
  1120 = 11 * 20
  2021 = 20 * 21
  2212 = 2 * 212
  00011 = 000 * 11
  02000 = 02 * 000
  0122212 = 012 * 2212
  11200201 = 1120 * 0201
  000111102 = 00011 * 1102
  202102000 = 2021 * 02000
  012221211200201 = 0122212 * 11200201
  000111102202102000 = 000111102 * 202102000
  012221211200201000111102202102000 = 012221211200201 * 000111102202102000
